title: Best way to convert guest accounts to members
excerpt:
Hi guys 
We ran some tests with some guests accounts but now need to change the users to members and then change the email addresses - I don’t want to have to add new members and delete the guests, as I have lots and lot…

posts.author: johnners (Drew)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi guys

We ran some tests with some guests accounts but now need to change the users to members and then change the email addresses - I don’t want to have to add new members and delete the guests, as I have lots and lots of column restrictions (edit/viewing).

Is there a way to convert the guests to members, then change their email addresses?

posts.author: JCorrell (Jim - The Monday Man)
posts.cookedHtml:
@johnners

Yes. Do exactly what you said… convert the guests to members, then change their email addresses.

The users themselves (or someone with access to their emails) will have to change the email addresses.
